name: control_system
description: Launch programs, run local system commands, and manage local files or folders.
rules: Program launch tasks: use file_op find_program first, then file_op launch.
Local file management tasks: use file_op list/find/read/delete/move/copy/tree/exists/stat directly.
For delete or cleanup tasks, inspect the directory first, then delete the matched files with explicit file_op delete blocks.
Do not claim access restrictions when the path is already known locally.
System shell commands should use powershell or cmd blocks.
notes: Use launch for programs and direct file_op actions for file management or cleanup tasks.
